### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containerd/stargz-snapshotter (github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/estargz)</summary>

### [`v0.18.1`](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/releases/tag/v0.18.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/compare/v0.18.0...v0.18.1)

#### Notable Changes

- Avoid repeated decompression and further utilize the --GH option to speed up conversion ([#​2145](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2145)), thanks to [@​escapefreeg](https://redirect.github.com/escapefreeg)
- Improved sortEntries performance ([#​2153](https://redirect.github.com/containerd/stargz-snapshotter/issues/2153)), thanks to [@​wswsmao](https://redirect.github.com/wswsmao)

</details>
